ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the athlete (M/F) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "weight_class" INTEGER /* Weight class of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete in centimeters */,
  "body_weight" REAL /* Body weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the athlete competes in (e.g., Novice, Open) */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* Type of equipment used by the athlete (e.g., Wraps, Raw) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the athlete */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Coach of the athlete */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team or club of the athlete */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the athlete */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the athlete */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the competition */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the competition */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the competition (e.g., State, National, International) */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Registration deadline for the competition */,
  "entry_fee" REAL /* Entry fee for the competition */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website for the competition */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the competition */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the competition */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone for the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition the event belongs to */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., SBD) */,
  "weight_class" INTEGER /* Weight class for the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., SBD, BB, DL) */,
  "event_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "event_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "judge_ids" TEXT /* IDs of the judges assigned to the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete the result belongs to */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the result belongs to */,
  "squat_attempt_1" REAL /* First squat attempt */,
  "squat_attempt_2" REAL /* Second squat attempt */,
  "squat_attempt_3" REAL /* Third squat attempt */,
  "squat_best_lift" REAL /* Best squat lift */,
  "bench_press_attempt_1" REAL /* First bench press attempt */,
  "bench_press_attempt_2" REAL /* Second bench press attempt */,
  "bench_press_attempt_3" REAL /* Third bench press attempt */,
  "bench_press_best_lift" REAL /* Best bench press lift */,
  "deadlift_attempt_1" REAL /* First deadlift attempt */,
  "deadlift_attempt_2" REAL /* Second deadlift attempt */,
  "deadlift_attempt_3" REAL /* Third deadlift attempt */,
  "deadlift_best_lift" REAL /* Best deadlift lift */,
  "total_score" REAL /* Total score for the athlete */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Place of the athlete in the event */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the athlete (e.g., Open, Novice) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, judge, athlete) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
